summary_en: Update to cost-of-capital and stock-price-conscious management initiatives. Specific targets and metrics not disclosed in excerpt.
title_en: Notice Regarding Response to Realizing Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price (Update)
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Sanwayuka Industry Corporation announced an update to its cost-of-capital and stock-price-conscious management initiatives. The board of directors reviewed and updated the company's response to realizing management that is conscious of cost of capital and stock price. The specific targets, metrics, horizon, and payout-ratio floor are contained in the attached detailed materials and are not disclosed in this announcement excerpt.
